string.text: A backpack used as a hiding-place, where one of the free stalkers hid his simple hack.
Empty army jar for water with a volume of 0.7 liters.
Army jar with clean water for 1 sip. One sip quenches 85% of thirst. To quench your thirst must be used.
Army jar with clean water for 2 sips. One sip quenches 85% of thirst. To quench your thirst must be used.
Army jar with clean water for 3 sips. One sip quenches 85% of thirst. To quench your thirst must be used.
